examples: "Bromance" is a portmanteau, a combination of the words "brother" and "romance".
Chillaxin is a portmanteau of chillin’ and relaxin’, refers to an extreme state of contentedness.
The name Wikipedia is a portmanteau of the words wiki (a type of collaborative website) and encyclopedia.
Then may want to consider this new and unique piece of kit from Toronto-based Portmanteau Devices.
Callahan's favorite group now is consumer discretionary, the standard portmanteau industry classification that includes retailers, automakers and advertising companies.
